mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (user_id, total_price, actual_price, status, payment_method, shipping_address, shipping_name, shipping_phone, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{totalPrice}, #{totalPrice}, #{status}, #{paymentMethod}, #{shippingAddress}, #{shippingName}, #{shippingPhone}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{orderId}
